messages.content: zh-en translate as dictionary "mentioned"

mentioned ['menʃənd] (v.) 

Definition: referred to or acknowledged something or someone in speech or writing.

Example: He mentioned that he had a doctor's appointment this afternoon.
zh-en translation of "facilitate" as dictionary

facilitate [fəˈsɪlɪteɪt] (v.)

Definition: to make a process or task easier or more efficient; to assist or help

Example: The new software will facilitate data entry and save us time.
zh-en translation of “facilitate”

facilitate [fəˈsɪlɪteɪt] (v.)

Definition: 促进，帮助，使容易，使顺畅

Example: 新的软件将促进数据输入，并节约我们的时间。
semantic

semantic [sɪˈmæntɪk] (adj.)

Definition: relating to the meaning of language and its use; concerned with the interpretation of meaning

Example: The semantic meaning of words can vary depending on context.
zh-en translate of "semantic"

semantic [sɪˈmæntɪk] (adj.)

Definition: 语义的；关于语言及其使用意义的；对意义的解释感兴趣的

Example: 词语的语义意义可以根据语境而有所不同。
delineated

delineated [dih-lin-ee-ey-tid] (adj.)

Definition: portrayed or described accurately and precisely; clearly marked out or defined

Example: The boundaries of the property were clearly delineated on the map.
zh-en "dependent"

dependent [dɪ'pɛndənt] (adj.)

Definition: 依赖的；受…支配的；取决于

Example: Children are dependent on their parents for care and support.
zh-en "delineated "

delineated [dɪˈlɪniˌeɪtɪd] (adj.)

Definition: 描述清晰的，轮廓分明的，准确描绘的

Example: 我们在地图上清晰勾画出了该地产的边界。
determining

determining [dɪˈtɜːmənɪŋ] (adj.)

Definition: having the power of deciding; influential in shaping or controlling outcomes

Example: The outcome of tomorrow's game will be largely determined by the performance of the team's star player.
zh-en "determining"

determining [dɪˈtɜːmɪnɪŋ] (adj.)

Definition: 决定性的，起决定作用的，有影响力的

Example: 明天比赛的结果将在很大程度上取决于队中的明星球员的表现。
zh-en "canonical"

canonical [kəˈnɒnɪkəl] (adj.)

Definition: 典范的，经典的，权威性的，符合标准或准则的

Example: 该公司采用了一种官方的、规范的方式来编写其代码库，以确保其代码是符合行业标准的。
zh-en "orhographic"

orthographic [ɔːθə'græfɪk] (adj.)

Definition: 正字法的，正字的，与拼写（或书写）规则有关的

Example: 他将这个单词拼写成了词典没有的形式，没有遵循正字法拼写的规则。
